monster_manual.description: Core monster stat blocks that can be referenced by any module

goblin.name: Goblin

special_abilities.name: Nimble Escape
special_abilities.description: Can disengage or hide as a bonus action

goblin.behavior: Cowardly, fights in groups, flees when outnumbered or wounded
goblin.tactics: Uses cover, shoots from range, retreats if losing
goblin.description: Small, green-skinned humanoid with pointed ears and yellow eyes

goblin_warrior.name: Goblin Warrior

special_abilities.name: Nimble Escape
special_abilities.description: Can disengage or hide as a bonus action

goblin_warrior.behavior: Aggressive front-line goblin that presses melee attacks.
goblin_warrior.tactics: Closes distance quickly and uses scimitar in direct combat.
goblin_warrior.description: A battle-hardened goblin carrying chipped armor and a worn scimitar.

goblin_scout.name: Goblin Scout

special_abilities.name: Nimble Escape
special_abilities.description: Can disengage or hide as a bonus action

goblin_scout.behavior: Skittish observer that probes and repositions frequently.
goblin_scout.tactics: Prefers ranged attacks and retreating behind cover.
goblin_scout.description: A lean goblin lookout with sharp eyes and a shortbow always ready.

goblin_fighter.name: Goblin Fighter

special_abilities.name: Nimble Escape
special_abilities.description: Can disengage or hide as a bonus action

goblin_fighter.behavior: Disciplined goblin combatant that commits to a fight unless morale breaks.
goblin_fighter.tactics: Balances melee and ranged pressure based on distance.
goblin_fighter.description: A sturdy goblin skirmisher trained to fight in organized pairs.

zombie.name: Zombie

special_abilities.name: Undead Fortitude
special_abilities.description: If reduced to 0 HP by non-radiant damage, roll 1d20. DC = 5 + damage taken. On success, drop to 1 HP instead.

zombie.behavior: Mindless, relentless, attacks nearest living creature
zombie.tactics: Shambles forward, no self-preservation, fights until destroyed
zombie.treasure: None (occasionally has items from former life)
zombie.description: Rotting corpse animated by dark magic, moves with jerky, unnatural motions

skeleton_warrior.name: Skeleton Warrior
skeleton_warrior.tactics: Uses weapons tactically, forms ranks, protects key areas
skeleton_warrior.description: Animated skeleton in tattered armor, bones held together by dark magic

tomb_guardian.name: Tomb Guardian

special_abilities.name: Guardian's Duty
special_abilities.description: Cannot leave the area they are bound to protect. +2 to attack and damage when defending their post.

special_abilities.name: Undead Resilience
special_abilities.description: Takes half damage from non-magical weapons

tomb_guardian.behavior: Dutiful protector, attacks intruders but does not pursue
tomb_guardian.tactics: Holds defensive position, strikes methodically, uses terrain advantage
tomb_guardian.treasure: Ancient armor and weapons (may be valuable)
tomb_guardian.description: Heavily armored undead warrior, ancient protector bound to guard sacred places

giant_rat.name: Giant Rat

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.special: Target must succeed DC 10 CON save or contract disease

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.description: Has advantage on attacks if ally is within 5ft of target

special_abilities.name: Keen Smell
special_abilities.description: Advantage on Perception checks using smell

giant_rat.behavior: Aggressive when in groups, skittish alone
giant_rat.tactics: Swarms from multiple directions, targets weakest-looking foe
giant_rat.description: Dog-sized rodent with matted fur and disease-ridden fangs

shadow_wraith.name: Shadow Wraith

attacks.name: Life Drain
attacks.special: Target's HP maximum reduced by damage amount until long rest

special_abilities.name: Shadow Stealth
special_abilities.description: Can hide in dim light or darkness as bonus action

special_abilities.name: Sunlight Weakness
special_abilities.description: Disadvantage on all rolls in sunlight

shadow_wraith.behavior: Hunts life force, drawn to warmth and light
shadow_wraith.tactics: Strikes from darkness, retreats when wounded, drains weakest targets
shadow_wraith.description: Incorporeal darkness in vaguely humanoid shape, with hollow eyes that hunger for life

dead_king.name: The Dead King

attacks.name: Necrotic Gaze
attacks.special: Target must succeed DC 14 CON save or be frightened until end of next turn

special_abilities.name: Royal Presence
special_abilities.description: Immune to turn undead and fear. When first reduced below half HP, gains temporary 10 HP and makes one additional attack this round.

special_abilities.name: Undead Fortitude
special_abilities.description: If reduced to 0 HP by non-radiant damage, DC 15 CON save. On success, drop to 1 HP instead (once per encounter).

dead_king.behavior: Ancient ruler who refused death; curses the living who disturb his rest. Speaks in broken, echoing Common. Fights from the throne until destroyed.
dead_king.tactics: Uses Crown's Wrath in melee; Necrotic Gaze when wounded or to break morale. Does not leave the throne room.
dead_king.treasure: Crown (cursed if worn), signet ring, 50 GP in ancient coins
dead_king.description: A skeletal figure in tattered royal robes and a corroded crown, wielding a blackened longsword. Eyes burn with cold blue fire. The source of the village's haunting.

training_dummy.name: Training Dummy
training_dummy.description: Straw-filled mannequin used for combat practice
